pi_items.source: task.json metadata field - file path specification
task.json metadata field - file path specification
task.json metadata field - user-specified target genre name to be created
Verified by querying Chinook database Genre table. These exact genre names exist with GenreId 1 (Rock) and 3 (Metal)

Verified by SQL query: Rock genre has 1297 tracks, Metal genre has 374 tracks. Total = 1671. Downloaded from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite
task.json metadata field - tolerance value for verification
Verified by SQL query on Chinook database: Track 345 'Whole Lotta Love' is in Rock genre (along with Medley and other versions)
Verified by SQL query on Chinook database: Track 77 'Enter Sandman' is in Metal genre (also exists as Track 1801)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database), a real music store dataset. Rock genre contains 1297 tracks and Metal genre contains 374 tracks, totaling exactly 1671 tracks to be consolidated. The sample tracks 'Whole Lotta Love' (Rock, TrackId 345) and 'Enter Sandman' (Metal, TrackId 77) both exist in the database. All metadata values about genres, track counts, and sample tracks are accurate representations of the actual Chinook database.
